basic_info.title: Lunar: Silver Star Story
basic_info.review: A timeless JRPG classic with a heartwarming story, memorable characters, and innovative gameplay mechanics that influenced generations of role-playing games.

play_today.details: Officially remastered version with updated HD graphics, modern UI enhancements, full voice acting, and seamless integration of all original content. The definitive edition for modern systems.
Official PSP port with enhanced graphics and voice acting. Requires PPSSPP emulator for modern systems but retains the original charm while improving visual presentation.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar Silver Star Harmony Complete UNDUB
recommended_patches.description: Restores original Japanese audio with English subtitles for authentic experience

description.synopsis: A young hero named Lunar sets out on a journey to become the next Moon God, battling cosmic threats and forming unbreakable bonds with companions across time and space.
key_features: Innovative 'Active Time Battle' system blending strategy and real-time elements
Branching narrative paths leading to multiple endings based on player choices
Iconic character designs by Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball)
Emotionally resonant story with memorable musical score composed by Hitoshi Sakimoto
description.long_description: Lunar: Silver Star Story, developed by Game Arts and published by Sega in 1992 for the Sega CD, revolutionized JRPG storytelling with its cinematic presentation and character-driven narrative. Originally titled Lunar: The Silver Star Story, it was later ported to PlayStation as 'Silver Star Story Complete' with expanded content including additional dungeons, characters, and story scenes. The game's blend of traditional turn-based combat with dynamic visual elements set a new standard for the genre. Its legacy continues through modern remasters that preserve its classic charm while updating visuals and accessibility features for contemporary players.
legacy_and_impact: Pioneered cinematic storytelling in JRPGs with full-motion video cutscenes
Influenced iconic series like Final Fantasy and Dragon Quest with its emotional narrative structure
Established the 'Complete' porting model for adding content to classic games
Became a benchmark for fan translation communities due to complex localization challenges
